channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: US prosecutors urge judge to deny Sam Bankman-Fried retrial bid: Report
item.description: Prosecutors say testimony from two former FTX executives cited by the defense does not qualify as newly discovered evidence, Bloomberg reported.

item.title: Bonk.fun warns hackers hijacked domain in wallet-drainer attack
item.description: Bonk.fun warned users not to use its site after attackers hijacked the domain and pushed a fake wallet-draining prompt.

item.title: Meet LITRO: The tokenized crude project to start pilot testing soon for 2027 debut
item.description: LITRO aims to modernize the $6 trillion oil market by replacing slow, paper-based settlement with 24/7, on-chain trading and redemption.

item.title: Asia’s biggest bitcoin buyer now wants to build the BTC ecosystem
item.description: Tokyo-listed Metaplanet is expanding beyond holding BTC into funding, incubating, and granting to companies building bitcoin financial infrastructure.

item.title: Across's acx rockets 80%, massively beating bitcoin, on plans to dump its DAO structure
item.description: The bridging protocol's team wants to exchange ACX tokens for equity in a new U.S. C-corp or buy holders out at a 25% premium, in what would be one of the first major reversals from token to traditional corporate structure.

item.title: Crypto code commits fall 75% as developers move to AI projects
item.description: Developers are shifting toward artificial intelligence infrastructure as blockchain ecosystems lose contributors across major networks, from Ethereum to Solana.

item.title: New Zealand regulator says NZDD stablecoin not a financial product
item.description: Law firm MinterEllisonRuddWatts, which acted on behalf of the stablecoin’s issuer, says the designation of the token is an important step for regulatory clarity.

item.title: AI agent payment volumes lower than reported, but adoption is growing: a16z
item.description: Andreessen Horowitz partner Noah Levine says AI agents made $1.6 million in payments in the past month, which “is not a big number, but the infrastructure being built around it is.”

item.title: Kalshi preemptively sues Iowa, claiming risk of enforcement action
item.description: Kalshi claims in a preemptive lawsuit that there is “a substantial risk” that Iowa will take action against it after a meeting it had with state regulators.

item.title: Stablecoin yields will bring fresh money to US banks: White House's Witt
item.description: Global demand for the US dollar is “massive,” and stablecoin yields will only bring more interest to the currency, argued the White House crypto chief.

item.title: XRP steadies near $1.38 as Bollinger squeeze hints at breakout before CPI
item.description: nvestors are closely watching the upcoming U.S. Consumer Price Index release, which could influence Federal Reserve policy expectations and risk appetite.

item.title: BoE open to scrapping stablecoin limit idea after backlash
item.description: Industry groups have criticized the UK’s proposed stablecoin holding limits, arguing they would signal that the UK is hostile to crypto and stifle innovation.

item.title: Metaplanet Deepens Bitcoin Strategy With $25M Investment Plan, New Venture Arm
item.description: Metaplanet is launching two subsidiaries and backing Japan's first licensed yen stablecoin as it bets on the country's digital asset infrastructure.

item.title: Bitcoin slips below $69,500 as tanker attacks send oil back above $100
item.description: Brent crude surged 10% after attacks on two oil tankers in Iraqi waters, with the prompt spread hitting levels not seen in years and MSCI Asia Pacific stocks falling 1.8%.

item.title: Metaplanet forms new venture firm as it expands Bitcoin playbook
item.description: Metaplanet said the new firm would support Japan-based Bitcoin projects in the payments and lending space in addition to stablecoins and tokenization-focused startups.

item.title: SEC, CFTC Strike Pact to Coordinate Crypto Rules and Oversight
item.description: The agencies have moved to coordinate oversight, in a bid to end years of regulatory overlap on the treatment of crypto.

item.title: Bonk.fun hacked: Domain hijacked, crypto drainer planted
item.description: The operator, known as Tom, said only users who signed a fake terms-of-service message on the compromised site after the breach were affected.

item.title: Hackers Hijack Bonk.fun Domain, Deploy Wallet-Draining Phishing Prompt
item.description: Browser warnings flagged the site for suspected phishing after attackers pushed a fake TOS message designed to trick users.

item.title: MediaTek patches bug enabling crypto seed theft in just 45 seconds
item.description: Ledger’s white-hat security team said it found a flaw in MediaTek's secure boot chain that can be used to steal sensitive information from certain Android devices.

item.title: Binance.US names new CEO as crypto exchange eyes expansion
item.description: Stephen Gregory, a former compliance executive at CEX.IO and Gemini, has taken over as CEO of Binance.US, a crypto exchange that was once a target of a long-running SEC lawsuit.

item.title: Ghana greenlights 11 crypto companies for regulatory sandbox
item.description: Ghana’s SEC could grant a full license to sandbox participants as early as six months, provided that their products are market-ready and that they tick all regulatory boxes.

item.title: Prime brokers push Wall Street access to prediction markets: Report
item.description: Clear Street and Marex Group are planning to offer prediction markets to clients, with Kalshi’s CEO tipping it to become a “core pillar of the financial ecosystem.”

item.title: Today our Board approved the establishment of two new wholly owned subsidiaries, Metaplanet Ventures and Metaplanet Asset Management. Metaplanet Ventures is our commitment to Japan's Bitcoin ecosystem. We'll be investing ¥4 billion over the next few - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiXkFVX3lxTFBvQlBWSTd5ekFDdjB3aDQ4ZExrVWQwdHpBRGgxbVhYM0pMNndaakM1QmNVWXlHMTAzQXJMcUdNWURYVXRoeVBZa2lBRFJUQzYxYmFCWGVYT3o5a25XM1E?oc=5" target="_blank">Today our Board approved the establishm…

item.title: As a shareholder, I would love for Binance's valuation to increase. But the fact is, Binance's valuation can't increase when crypto prices are down. It can't get simpler than that. Stating the obvious: Binance is the largest crypto exchange. It grows and shrinks with - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYEFVX3lxTE5ramFIUTFBU1BUR25ZUW02ZkcyTG9lTGx6UkI2R2tnZkljVnVUaXk1dzh5b3VyYWNxLXhwZEpYUnNaNkJhcHM0aFBGRGU4VWdOWFh6OWg5Xzg1clU5dWFQbQ?oc=5" target="_blank">As a shareholder, I would love for B…

item.title: SEC, CFTC sign memo to regulate crypto, other markets in harmony
item.description: The SEC and CFTC said they would adopt a “minimum effective dose” regulatory strategy to foster innovation while maintaining market integrity and keep the US competitive globally.

item.title: Crypto Traders Turn to Hyperliquid for Oil Bets Amid Iran Volatility
item.description: Nearly $1 billion in synthetic oil futures were traded on Wednesday amid reactions to geopolitical tensions and fears of future price spikes.

item.title: SEC, CFTC end years of rivalry with deal that will mean combined crypto oversight
item.description: The two agencies sealed their memorandum of understanding to link the parts of their work that overlap, and coordinated crypto oversight is among the top goals.

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, NFTs, Web3 and crypto regulation.

item.title: Most AI Chatbots Will Help a Teen Plan a Mass Shooting, Study Finds
item.description: A new study found eight of the 10 major AI chatbots helped fake teen accounts plan school shootings, assassinations, and bombings.

item.title: Ripple to buy back $750M in shares through April: Report
item.description: Despite a decline in the price of XRP in the last year, Ripple is expected to reach a valuation 25% higher than reported after a November 2025 funding round.

item.title: Mastercard launches crypto partner program with a ‘who's who’ of industry
item.description: The program connects crypto companies, banks and payment providers to explore blockchain-based payment and settlement infrastructure.

item.title: Ripple Begins Buying Back Shares at $50 Billion Valuation: Bloomberg
item.description: The XRP-linked Ripple is buying back shares from investors and employees at a $50 billion valuation, according to a report from Bloomberg.

item.title: Crypto platform Bullish climbs past Coinbase to become third-largest crypto exchange by spot volume
item.description: The institutional-focused exchange saw spot trading jump 62% to $76 billion in February, surpassing Coinbase’s market share.

item.title: Bitcoin holds $70,000, starting to show relative strength versus stocks, software sector, and gold
item.description: Bitcoin is up about 7% from the Sunday lows, even as equities and gold tread water. Analysts point to seller exhaustion, shifting gold correlation and improving ETF flows.

item.title: Revolut obtains UK bank license, teases upcoming services
item.description: The financial tech company was granted a full UK banking license on Wednesday and has also applied for a federal bank charter in the United States.

item.title: Officially a Cowboy ✍️ #DallasCowboys | @blockchain - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE5yOFBOVDRDd0pLLUYxby1MSzdLVUllemNjREpSbzZPLXZldUVYRVVvQkxfRnBNalVFMXBlMmNCSDNtTGp5MXNuUTJydkF5T1hUT0RJOURva2F5c1Y0WEFlTTFzaFg?oc=5" target="_blank">Officially a Cowboy ✍️ #DallasC…

item.title: Bitcoin to $78K? Pro traders price in less than 17% odds of a breakout
item.description: Bitcoin remains under pressure as war and poor jobs data offset ETF inflows, shifting the $78,000 price target from late March to the coming months.

item.title: In 2010, someone could have bought 220 bitcoin for $1, but said "F*ck that shit." That 220 BTC is $15.5 million today ☠️ - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTFBHRGJkWlZJazB2VVpMUjhrY18zUFRVV0RIOHFzUVpSQmtVQ3Axdzc1THRvZk05cVJsekd2QVVJZXU2cTRwR01VOHdTX01aT25vem9Bc01JUnFGSFFhM3lzY3JRd2J1dGc?oc=5" target="_blank">In 2010, someone could have…

item.title: Grammarly Disables AI 'Expert Review' After Backlash From Authors and Journalists
item.description: Grammarly said it will rethink the tool after criticism that it used real experts—including some who are deceased—without consent.

item.title: FDIC chair says no deposit insurance for stablecoins under GENIUS Act
item.description: A proposed plan by the agency would ban “pass-through insurance“ for stablecoins by third parties in addition to the FDIC not insuring deposits under the law.

item.title: Ripple's share buyback program values the firm at $50 billion
item.description: Despite the bear market, today's report suggests a higher valuation than the $40 billion at which the firm raised funds in November.

item.title: Foundry plans Zcash mining pool amid institutional interest in privacy coin
item.description: The digital asset infrastructure company plans to launch the pool in April as it expands beyond Bitcoin mining services.

item.title: Microsoft Sides With Anthropic Against Trump Admin’s Supply Chain Risk Designation
item.description: Microsoft filed a court brief backing Anthropic's lawsuit against the Pentagon—a move that reveals just how much the tech giant has riding on Claude's survival.

item.title: Wells Fargo Applies for WFUSD Trademark, Signaling Use in Crypto and Stablecoins
item.description: Wells Fargo has applied for a trademark for "WFUSD" for potential use in service categories that mention crypto and stablecoins.

item.title: Android Phone Crypto Wallets Could Be at Risk Due to MediaTek Exploit: Ledger
item.description: A vulnerability in some MediaTek-powered phones could allow attackers to extract encrypted data, including wallet seed phrases, using only a USB connection.

item.title: We raised $5M to build the infrastructure Bitcoin was missing. Smart contracts on Bitcoin L1. The programmable Bitcoin era starts with OP_NET. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiXkFVX3lxTE5pNzROaVFJMS1PMHZjNHc1dUZxNk5mVU1neFZwc29LOHk0S2kxaU9hdjkxNkNxV3VCT3pLcUpxTEZtbkV6R05jS0toVHQzOWEwd042emhtel82UjNPTHc?oc=5" target="_blank">We raised $5M to build the infrastructu…

item.title: Myriad to Use USD1 on BNB Chain as Exclusive Settlement Asset
item.description: The prediction market is the first to use the USD1 stablecoin as its main settlement layer, creating a “faster, simpler” user experience.

item.title: Justin Sun Deal Complicates SEC's Crypto Stance, Legal Experts Say
item.description: The Trump SEC appears to contend a token connected to Sun was offered as a security. The admission could complicate the regulator’s new views on crypto.

item.title: Assessing the FATF Targeted Report: The Shift Toward Secondary Market Monitoring for Stablecoins
item.description: TL;DR The 84% reality: Stablecoins now account for the vast majority of illicit crypto transaction volume. This shift — aligned… The post Assessing the FATF Targeted Report: The Shift Toward Secondary Market Monitoring for Stablecoins appe…

item.title: Bloomberg strategist doubles down on $10,000 bitcoin call but peers say it would take a nuclear war to get there
item.description: The longtime bitcoin bear's gloom-and-doom call met with fierce rebuttal from industry analysts.

item.title: Crypto-friendly fintech Revolut gains full UK banking license
item.description: The move is a major step in Revolut's goal to become a global digital bank. Services like crypto and stock trading remain separate.

item.title: Stablecoins won't get any kind of deposit insurance under GENIUS rules, says FDIC chief
item.description: The chairman of the U.S. Federal Deposit Insurance Corp. made clear that even pass-through deposit insurance won't be allowed from third-party firms.

item.title: Crypto Long & Short: AI agents choosing denationalized money
item.description: In this week’s Crypto Long & Short Newsletter, Sylvia To on AI agents choosing denationalized money.

item.title: Top Bitcoin Mining Pool Operator Foundry Is Getting Into Zcash
item.description: Foundry Digital said it plans to offer a mining pool for Zcash next month, enabling people to earn the coin using shared resources.

item.title: Ethereum is no longer a single execution environment. It is an ecosystem of chains. But chain identities today live in GitHub files, client-side mappings, and app-specific logic. There is no shared source of truth. on.eth introduces one. 🧵 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYEFVX3lxTE5ONEY2TEdpblh2d2VBWVFRQW5WN3pWNUxJeWZIc2M2bnM2Y0FvX2xWNHFTd3R0aXZuNVZ2dEVkX1JxV2VlTXIteDlhQjZnelR0R2FNcDY4cmlXYlEzNUJTbw?oc=5" target="_blank">Ethereum is no longer a single execu…

item.title: Mastercard Recruits Binance, Ripple and PayPal for Crypto Partner Program
item.description: Over 85 crypto industry firms have signed on for Mastercard’s new initiative, which it said will inform future products and services.

item.title: JUST IN: Mastercard launches program to connect crypto blockchain payments with global banking, partnering with 85+ companies including: • Circle • Paxos • Ripple • PayPal • Gemini • Binance - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE44QW9Xa05pZzlQbl9wc0ozek1JenJycnpkTlFzMHNMSFd3R0RxdG5KRkpxTm80OVZPeWc4MGpKZDdwYVQwNjRNLTlMSXRXX2ZXWktSMjQ2eGVKMG1ocVY1Rmh3?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: Mastercard launches progr…

item.title: Wells Fargo signals deeper push into crypto, filing trademark for WFUSD
item.description: The move mirrors JPMorgan's similar trademark filing that foreshadowed the bank's introduction of tokenized deposits on Ethereum layer-2 network Base.

item.title: Brera Stock Plunges Amid Growing Solana Pivot as 'Solmate' Firm Dumps Soccer Teams
item.description: Shares in Solana firm Brera Holdings plunged early Wednesday after the company said it's going nearly all-in on its crypto pivot.

item.title: European Central Bank unveils tokenized finance plan to bolster EU's financial autonomy
item.description: The Appia roadmap for a euro-based tokenized financial system is part of the European Union’s push to reduce reliance on foreign financial infrastructure.
